calibration_meta.note: target_recall=0.80 is a conservative operating point motivated by the recall-prioritisation principle in: Gagliardi & Saponara (2020, Energies) — EN50155-grounded IoT fire detection; Sadat et al. (2025, AAAI) — recall as primary selection criterion in fire surveillance. The value is consistent with, not derived from, the D-Fire empirical recall range (~70-73% model mAP-recall, Mamadaliev et al. 2024, Fire).
